APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY. COUNSEL INFORMED THE COURT OF THE CLERICAL ERROR ON THE PROOF OF SERVICE, MOVING PAPERS WERE HAND DELIVERED TO THE PLAINTIFF AND NOT BY CERTIFIED MAIL. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2003 Continued To Jan-15-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jamie A. Radack, Esq. of CODDINGTON, HICKS & DANFORTH 650/592-5400, for
Defendant Progressive west Insurance Co., moving for summary judgment

Ruling:
* Counsel informed the Court of the clerical error on the proof of service. The moving papers were hand delivered to the plaintiff and not by certified mail.
** The Court ordered continued the hearing of DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Counsel is to contact the clerk for a hearing date.
*** Off the record, matter was continued to 1/15/04 at 9:30 a.m. (302/KMM) JUDGE: KEVIN M. MCCARTHY, CSR: MITCH LYON, CSR #6840
